heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 170110 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)17011036:1165., , .Aug. 11, 1971Pub. L. 92–93, § 1585 Stat. 319
